title: Contrast with aunque and sin embargo
subtitle: Add simple contrast.
overview: Sin embargo is a useful written and spoken connector.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Although I was tired, I studied.

items.es: Aunque tenía poco tiempo, terminé la tarea.
items.en: Although I had little time, I finished the homework.

items.es: El hotel era caro; sin embargo, estaba muy bien ubicado.
items.en: The hotel was expensive; however, it was very well located.

items.es: No entendí todo, pero entendí la idea principal.
items.en: I did not understand everything, but I understood the main idea.

items.es: Hacía frío; aun así, caminamos por el centro.
items.en: It was cold; even so, we walked downtown.

items.es: Aunque me cuesta hablar, sigo practicando.
items.en: Although speaking is hard for me, I keep practicing.
